title: Haryana School Summer Vacation 2026 Dates: Check Latest Update on Haryana CM Announced Summer Holidays for Government, Airforce, Army, Private & Central Schools Amid High Temperature, Heatwaves - Dailyhunt
full_text:
Haryana School Summer Vacation 2026 Dates: Amid rising temperatures and heatwave conditions across North India, summer vacations have been announced for schools in Haryana.
According to the latest updates, government and private schools in the state are expected to remain closed for summer holidays from June 1 to June 30, 2026.
The decision comes as several northern states, including Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Punjab, and Haryana, revise school schedules due to extreme heat conditions. Authorities have advised schools and parents to follow official notifications for any further extension or changes in reopening dates.
Haryana Summer Vacation 2026 Dates
Haryana CM Summer Holiday Announcement Latest Update
As temperatures continue to rise across Haryana, the state government has taken precautionary measures to protect students from severe heatwave conditions. Reports suggest that the Education Department has issued instructions regarding summer holidays for both government and private schools.
Several schools in NCR regions, including Gurugram and Faridabad, have also revised timings or shifted to morning schedules before the summer break.
Why Haryana Schools Are Closing for Summer Vacation 2026
The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has warned of intense heatwave conditions in several parts of North India. In response, states including Haryana have either extended holidays or adjusted school timings to ensure student safety.
Authorities have urged parents and students to:
- Avoid outdoor activities during peak afternoon hours
Haryana School Summer Vacation 2026 Latest News
According to multiple reports, Haryana schools are likely to observe a month-long summer break in June 2026. However, any further extension of holidays will depend on weather conditions and government advisories.
Will Haryana Schools Extend Summer Vacation 2026?
Parents and students are eagerly waiting to know whether Haryana school summer vacations will be extended due to the ongoing heatwave. Officials have stated that any decision regarding an extension will depend on weather conditions and IMD heatwave alerts in the coming weeks. Students are advised to regularly check updates issued by the Haryana Education Department and their respective schools.
Haryana School Timing Changes Before Summer Vacation
Before the summer holidays begin, several schools across Haryana have revised their daily schedules due to extreme temperatures. Many institutions shifted classes to early morning hours to protect students from excessive heat exposure during afternoon timings.
Haryana School Summer Vacation 2026 Guidelines for Students
During the summer break, health officials and school authorities have advised students to:
- Follow weather advisories issued by local authorities
Parents are also encouraged to ensure children maintain proper hydration and avoid unnecessary outdoor activities during heatwave conditions.
Haryana Government Schools Summer Vacation 2026
The Haryana government has announced summer vacations for government schools across the state due to rising temperatures and heatwave conditions. Government schools are expected to remain closed from June 1 to June 30, 2026. Teachers and school staff may receive separate instructions regarding administrative duties during the vacation period.
Students and parents are advised to stay updated through official notifications issued by the Haryana Education Department.
Haryana Private Schools Summer Vacation 2026
Private schools in Haryana are also expected to follow the summer vacation schedule announced by the state authorities. Several private schools in cities like Gurugram, Faridabad, Panipat, and Hisar had already revised school timings due to extreme heat before the holiday announcement.
Some schools may conduct optional online activities, holiday assignments, or summer camps during the vacation period.
Haryana Airforce Schools Summer Vacation 2026
With official permission and authority from Air Headquarters (Air HQ) through the Indian Air Force Education and Cultural Society (IAF E&CS), Air Force Schools in Haryana, including Air Force School Gurugram, are taking their summer vacation from May 14 to June 16, 2026.
Haryana Army Schools Summer Vacation 2026
Haryana Air Force Schools Summer Vacation started from 10 May to 30 June 2026. The Army Welfare Education Society (AWES) mandates the calendar baseline centrally. Locally, the School Chairman (the military Station Commander) formally grants the holidays, aligning with Haryana Government emergency heatwave safety orders.
Haryana Central Schools Summer Vacation 2026
Central schools operating in Haryana, including Kendriya Vidyalayas (KVs) and other centrally administered institutions, are also May 8, 2026, to June 16, 2026. However, the Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS) Headquarters in New Delhi decides and grants the summer vacation schedule for every Kendriya Vidyalaya in India.
Parents should regularly check official school notices for exact reopening dates and any changes in the holiday schedule.
